description_long: This vending machine is a rectangular, upright unit with a predominantly white and gray body, accented by green diagonal stripes on the front. The front face features a transparent display window showcasing various bottled and canned beverages, with visible Japanese text and colorful product labels. Above the main display, a yellow-orange sign with Japanese writing and an image of an orange drink is mounted, drawing attention to a featured product. The right side of the machine displays a large blue octagonal label with a can illustration and more Japanese text, while the left side mirrors this design. The payment interface and product retrieval slot are located on the lower right of the front panel, with a black section for instructions and a visible card or coin slot. The back of the machine is a solid dark gray, with no visible features or openings.
description: A modern Japanese beverage vending machine with a white and gray body, colorful product display, and prominent signage. Features include a transparent front window, payment interface, and side branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the transparent product display, payment interface, retrieval slot, and yellow-orange signage on top.
description_view_1: Right side view with a large blue octagonal label featuring a can illustration and Japanese text; signage top is partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with a solid dark gray panel and the top signage just visible above the edge.
description_view_3: Left side view, mirroring the right with a blue octagonal label and partial top signage.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular display panel is located on the upper front, behind a transparent window, showing beverage products and Japanese text. There is also a black instruction area below the product window.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is present on the right side of the front panel, featuring a card or coin slot and a rectangular area for payment processing.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: Individual product selection buttons are visible below each beverage in the display window, arranged in a grid corresponding to the product layout.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular product retrieval slot is located at the lower front, beneath the display window, with a black flap or door.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Branding includes a yellow-orange sign with Japanese text and an orange drink image on top, as well as blue octagonal labels with can illustrations and Japanese text on both sides.
